About
Hybrid
Researcher
& Designer

UX Researcher & Product Designer focused on data-informed decisions and user-centered strategy. Over a decade in Barcelona's tech ecosystem shaping products across mobile, web, B2B, B2C, SaaS, and CRM contexts.

My work bridges raw data and actionable design — translating research into strategic priorities that align user needs with business goals across cross-functional teams.

  • Multi-product experience (web + mobile) in high-velocity environments
  • Mentorship and practice-building at scale
  • Comfortable with limited resources and tight timelines
  • Introduced AI-based synthetic users for early validation

Mobile UX Researcher & Product Designer
Leadtech Group · Barcelona
Drove end-to-end UX research and product design for 16+ iOS and Android apps.

  • Led mixed-method research to define MVPs and guide growth iterations.
  • Partnered with PMs to translate insights into strategic roadmap priorities.
  • Introduced AI-based synthetic users for early validation.

How I Work 6-step playbook
01
Align
Business objectives, metrics, risks, hypotheses
02
Choose
Method: generative vs. evaluative; rigor vs. speed
03
Execute
Interviews, surveys, testing (moderated / unmoderated), analytics
04
Synthesize
Patterns, insights, opportunities — JTBD, clustering, theming
05
Decide
Prioritized recommendations and experiment plan
06
Measure
Conversion, retention, task-completion metrics and learnings
Qualitative
In-depth interviews Guided tasks Diary / light ethnography Co-creation Card sorting AI-assisted
Quantitative
Surveys A/B & concept tests Behavioral analysis Cohorts & funnels
Synthesis
Personas / segments JTBD Journey maps Opportunity solution trees RICE / ACE
